main.description: A Craftsky-specific profile extension. Signals that an account is active on Craftsky and stores craft-specific preferences. The base profile (display name, avatar, bio) continues to live in app.bsky.actor.profile. Use a fixed record key of 'self'.

crafts.description: The crafts this user practices. Free-form but clients may normalize against the knownValues of social.craftsky.feed.post#projectDetails.craftType.
